name: creative-leads-worker
description: Creative Leads Desktop Worker — scraping runs on the user's machine

scripts.dev: tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && tailwindcss -i src/renderer/styles.css -o dist/renderer/styles.css && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.mkdirSync('dist/renderer',{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync('src/renderer/index.html','dist/renderer/index.html')" && concurrently "tsc -p tsconfig.main.json -w" "esbuild src/renderer/index.tsx --bundle --outfile=dist/renderer/index.js --platform=browser --watch" "tailwindcss -i src/renderer/styles.css -o dist/renderer/styles.css --watch" "cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.build:renderer: esbuild src/renderer/index.tsx --bundle --outfile=dist/renderer/index.js --platform=browser --minify && tailwindcss -i src/renderer/styles.css -o dist/renderer/styles.css --minify && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.mkdirSync('dist/renderer',{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync('src/renderer/index.html','dist/renderer/index.html')"
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
